productDisplayName: John Miller Men Gingham Orange Shirt
description: Composition Orange gingham shirt made of a cotton/polyester blend, has short sleeves, spread collar, a buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the left chest, embroidered branding on the right cuff and a curved hem Fit Classic Wash care Hand or machine wash cold with mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron Designed for the ambitious executive, this formal shirt from the john miller collection is stitched to perfection. Pair it with crisp formal pants, a blazer, classy accessories and leather formal shoes. Model Statistics The product is a size 40 on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
